name: Qingling Motors Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingling Motors Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells Isuzu trucks in the People's Republic of China. The company offers light, medium, and heavy-duty trucks; pick-up trucks; and multi-purpose vehicles, as well as chassis and automobile parts, engines, accessories, and others. It is also involved in the production of moulds for the manufacture of automobile parts; and automobile retailing and after-sales services. Qingling Motors Co., Ltd. also exports its products. The company was founded in 1946 and is based in Chongqing, the People's Republic of China. Qingling Motors Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Qingling Motors (Group) Company Limited.
